title: for and since | when ... ? and how long ... ?

data.en: We've been waiting for two hours.
data.cn: 我们已经等了两个小时了。
data.hint: for + 时间段，配合现在完成进行时表示动作的持续。
accept: We have been waiting for two hours.

data.en: Sally has been working here for six months.
data.cn: 萨莉在这里工作六个月了。
data.hint: work 可以配合现在完成进行时，for six months 表示六个月这段时间。
accept: Sally has worked here for six months.

data.en: I haven't seen Tom for three days.
data.cn: 我有三天没见到汤姆了。
data.hint: 否定句中用 for + 时间段表示“多久没做某事”。
accept: I have not seen Tom for three days.

data.en: They've been married for ten years.
data.cn: 他们结婚十年了。
data.hint: married 是状态形容词，表示状态持续了十年。
accept: They have been married for ten years.

data.en: They haven't had a holiday for ten years.
data.cn: 他们十年没有休假了。
data.hint: have a holiday 表示休假，否定句用 haven't had。
accept: They have not had a holiday for ten years.
They haven't had a holiday in ten years.
They have not had a holiday in ten years.

data.en: They haven't had a holiday in ten years.
data.cn: 他们十年里没休过假。
data.hint: 在否定句中，可以用 in 代替 for 表示时间段。
accept: They haven't had a holiday for ten years.
They have not had a holiday for ten years.
They have not had a holiday in ten years.

data.en: Paul has lived in Brazil for ten years.
data.cn: 保罗在巴西住了十年了。
data.hint: live 可以使用完成简单时，搭配 for ten years。
accept: Paul has been living in Brazil for ten years.

data.en: We've been sitting here for an hour.
data.cn: 我们在这里坐了一个小时了。
data.hint: sit 在此处是进行状态的持续，双写 t 加 ing。
accept: We have been sitting here for an hour.

data.en: I haven't been to a party for ages.
data.cn: 我好久没去过派对了。
data.hint: for ages 表示很久了，been to 表示去过。
accept: I have not been to a party for ages.

data.en: It hasn't rained for a few weeks.
data.cn: 不下雨已经有几个星期了。
data.hint: a few weeks 是一些星期，表示一段时间。
accept: It has not rained for a few weeks.

data.en: We've been waiting since 8 o'clock.
data.cn: 我们从八点就开始等了。
data.hint: since + 时间起点，配合现在完成进行时。
accept: We have been waiting since 8 o'clock.

data.en: Sally has been working here since April.
data.cn: 萨莉从四月份开始就在这里工作了。
data.hint: April 是月份起点，用 since 连接。
accept: Sally has worked here since April.

data.en: I haven't seen Tom since Monday.
data.cn: 自周一以来我就一直没见过汤姆。
data.hint: Monday 是星期起点，使用 since。
accept: I have not seen Tom since Monday.

data.en: Kevin has been looking for a job since he left school.
data.cn: 凯文自毕业离校以来就一直在找工作。
data.hint: since 引导的时间状语从句用一般过去时 (left school)。

data.en: I haven't seen him since last week.
data.cn: 自上周以来我就没见过他。
data.hint: last week 是过去的时间起点，搭配 since。
accept: I have not seen him since last week.

data.en: She's been away since Friday.
data.cn: 她从星期五开始就一直不在。
data.hint: be away 表示离开/不在，Friday 是具体起点。
accept: She has been away since Friday.

data.en: They've known each other since they were at school.
data.cn: 他们自上学时起就互相认识了。
data.hint: know 只能用简单时，since 从句中 were 是过去式。
accept: They have known each other since they were at school.

data.en: He has been ill since Sunday.
data.cn: 他自周日以来一直生病。
data.hint: ill 是形容词作表语，since Sunday 是时间起点。

data.en: I've had a headache since I woke up.
data.cn: 自醒来时起我就一直头痛。
data.hint: headache 是名词，have a headache 表示头痛，woke up 是 wake up 的过去式。
accept: I have had a headache since I woke up.

data.en: The meeting has been going on since 9 o'clock.
data.cn: 会议从九点就开始进行。
data.hint: go on 表示持续进行，9 o'clock 是起始时间。

data.en: When did it start raining?
data.cn: 什么时候开始下雨的？
data.hint: When 提问过去的时间点，搭配一般过去时 did ... start。

data.en: How long has it been raining?
data.cn: 雨下了多久了？
data.hint: How long 提问动作持续的时长，搭配现在完成进行时。

data.en: When did Joe and Kate first meet?
data.cn: 乔和凯特是什么时候初次相遇的？
data.hint: first meet 是初次见面，When 提问过去的时间。

data.en: They first met when they were at school.
data.cn: 他们是在上学时初次相遇的。
data.hint: met 是 meet 的过去式，when 引导过去时间状语从句。

data.en: How long have they known each other?
data.cn: 他们互相认识多久了？
data.hint: How long 引导现在完成时疑问句，know 用过去分词 known。

data.en: They've known each other for a long time.
data.cn: 他们认识很久了。
data.hint: known each other 表示认识彼此，for a long time 表示很长一段时间。
accept: They have known each other for a long time.

data.en: When did you buy this car?
data.cn: 你是什么时候买这辆车的？
data.hint: buy 是瞬间动词，用 When + 一般过去时提问购买的时间点。

data.en: How long have you been waiting?
data.cn: 你等了多久了？
data.hint: How long 提问等待动作的持续，搭配完成进行时。

data.en: When did your course start?
data.cn: 你的课程是什么时候开始的？
data.hint: start 是瞬间动词，提问开始时间点用 When + did。

data.en: When did Anna arrive in London?
data.cn: 安娜是什么时候到达伦敦的？
data.hint: arrive 是瞬间动词，到达某个大地方用 in。

data.en: It's two years since I last saw Joe.
data.cn: 我上次见到乔是两年前了。
data.hint: It's + 时间段 + since + 一般过去时，表示自上次发生某事以来有多久。
accept: It is two years since I last saw Joe.

data.en: It's been two years since I last saw Joe.
data.cn: 自从我上次见到乔已经过去两年了。
data.hint: 可以使用 It's been (= It has been) 代替 It's。
accept: It has been two years since I last saw Joe.

data.en: It's ages since we went to the cinema.
data.cn: 我们很久没去电影院了。
data.hint: ages 表示很长时间，went 是 go 的过去式。
accept: It is ages since we went to the cinema.

data.en: It's been ages since we went to the cinema.
data.cn: 自我们去电影院已经过去好久了。
data.hint: It's been ages since ... 和 It's ages since ... 同义。
accept: It has been ages since we went to the cinema.

data.en: How long is it since Mrs Hill died?
data.cn: 希尔太太去世多久了？
data.hint: How long is it since ...? 提问自某事发生以来过去多久了。

data.en: How long has it been since Mrs Hill died?
data.cn: 希尔太太去世已经过去多久了？
data.hint: 用 How long has it been since ...? 提问，died 是过去式。

data.en: No, it's five years since I last had a holiday.
data.cn: 不，自我上次度假以来已经有五年了。
data.hint: No 开头，had a holiday 表示度假，过去时态。
accept: No, it is five years since I last had a holiday.

data.en: No, it's about a month since I last saw Lisa.
data.cn: 不，我上一次见到丽莎大约是在一个月前。
data.hint: about a month 表示大约一个月，saw 是 see 的过去式。
accept: No, it is about a month since I last saw Lisa.

data.en: No, it's a long time since I last went swimming.
data.cn: 不，我很久没有去游泳了。
data.hint: went swimming 表示去游泳，过去式。
accept: No, it is a long time since I last went swimming.

data.en: No, it's ages since I last rode a bike.
data.cn: 不，我很久没有骑自行车了。
data.hint: rode 是 ride 的过去式，a bike 表示自行车。
accept: No, it is ages since I last rode a bike.

data.en: I've lived here all my life.
data.cn: 我一生都住在这里。
data.hint: all my life 前面不能加 for 引导时间段。
accept: I have lived here all my life.

data.en: It's been raining since lunchtime.
data.cn: 自午餐时间以来就一直在下雨。
data.hint: lunchtime 是时间点，前面用 since。
accept: It has been raining since lunchtime.

data.en: She got married a year ago.
data.cn: 她是一年前结婚的。
data.hint: get married 的过去式 got married，搭配 ago 过去时间点。

data.en: I've been working in a hotel for six months.
data.cn: 我在一家旅馆工作六个月了。
data.hint: work in a hotel 表示在旅馆工作，for six months 表示六个月时间段。
accept: I have been working in a hotel for six months.
I've worked in a hotel for six months.
I have worked in a hotel for six months.

data.en: Kate started learning Japanese a long time ago.
data.cn: 凯特很久以前就开始学习日语了。
data.hint: start doing sth. 表示开始做某事，a long time ago 表示很久以前。

data.en: No, I haven't had a holiday for five years.
data.cn: 不，我有五年没有休过假了。
data.hint: No 开头，否定句 hadn't had，for five years 表示五年。
accept: No, I have not had a holiday for five years.
No, I haven't had a holiday in five years.
No, I have not had a holiday in five years.

data.en: No, I haven't seen Lisa for about a month.
data.cn: 不，我有大约一个月没见到丽莎了。
data.hint: 否定句 haven't seen，for about a month 表示大约一个月。
accept: No, I have not seen Lisa for about a month.

data.en: No, I haven't been swimming for a long time.
data.cn: 不，我很久没有去游泳了。
data.hint: been swimming 表示进行游泳活动，搭配 for a long time。
accept: No, I have not been swimming for a long time.

data.en: No, I haven't ridden a bike for ages.
data.cn: 不，我好久没有骑自行车了。
data.hint: ridden 是 ride 的过去分词，for ages 表示很久了。
accept: No, I have not ridden a bike for ages.

data.en: They first met a long time ago.
data.cn: 他们很久以前初次相见。
data.hint: first met 初次相见，a long time ago 很久以前。
